latestHandover: Phase 1 complete + VD-12 critical fix. 11 tasks implemented across 7 repos. 7 findings closed: VD-01 (role), VD-02 (path), VD-03 (IaC), VD-04 (standardise), VD-05 (app_id), VD-11 (policy), VD-12 (deploy-bot identity — root cause of all deploy failures). 5 findings remain: VD-06 (shared workflow), VD-07 (supabase readiness), VD-08-T2 (contract doc), VD-09 (validation), VD-10 (DoD). First successful deploy: planner-frontend run 23521492463.

sessionHistory.summary: Live Vault interrogation, created ci-website-frontend role+policy, fixed ci-supabase-receptor policy mount path, codified all roles/policies as IaC in receptor-infra/vault/, standardised all deploy.yml to Option A path format, migrated receptor-planner to ARC runner + Vault OIDC.

Discovered deploy-bot Vault secret stored wrong App identity (k3s-vault app_id 3095294 + wrong private key). Patched app_id to 3127975, replaced private_key with deploy-bot PEM. Verified fix with successful planner-frontend deploy (run 23521492463). Fixed dm-ra-01→Common-Bond org references. Pushed all 6 repos.
